- 2-piece, silver, hardshell at $514.72

The closest red variant would be either:
- 2-piece, red, hardshell at $532.58 (Item 8964750292) - same piece count and material
- 2-piece, red, softshell at $499.29 (Item 7160999700) - same piece count but different material

I think the best match is the 2-piece, red, hardshell (Item 8964750292) since it keeps the same piece count and material, just changing the color to red.
